title: Job Opening Category Manager at Shyaway Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Shyaway Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shyaway Digital Technologies family as a Category Manager in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shyaway Digital Technologies:
Shyaway Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway Digital Technologies!
